text: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ Zionist media reported that a Hezbollah missile struck the settlement of Karmiel.
text_zh: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 犹太复国主义媒体报道称，一枚真主党导弹击中了卡尔米尔定居点。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧🇺🇸 Negotiations between Israel and Lebanon are set to open on Tuesday in Washington at the ambassadorial level. Lebanese Culture Minister Ghassan Salamé said the meeting is not for negotiations but for “discussions or talks of a logistical nature."…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Lebanese Foreign Minister Youssef Rajji said that the goal of direct negotiations with Israel is to achieve a ceasefire. He confirmed that Lebanon has effectively separated its file from the Iranian track, and that the state alone holds the decision to negotiate. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧🇺🇸 以色列与黎巴嫩之间的谈判定于周二在华盛顿以大使级举行。黎巴嫩文化部长加桑·萨拉梅表示，此次会议并非为了谈判，而是为了‘进行后勤性质的讨论或谈话’。” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 黎巴嫩外交部长优素福·拉吉表示，与以色列进行直接谈判的目标是实现停火。他证实，黎巴嫩已有效地将其档案与伊朗轨道分离开来，且国家独自掌握谈判决定权。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in Kiryat Shmona, and the surrounding areas of the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部谢莫纳城及其周边对抗线地区响起红色警报。 @wfwitness

text: Netanyahu compares nuclear facilities to extermination camps: If we had not acted, then places like Natanz, Fordow, and Bushehr would be remembered like Auschwitz, Majdanek, and Sobibor.
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡将核设施比作灭绝营：如果我们没有采取行动，那么像纳坦兹、福尔多和布什尔这样的地方就会像奥斯威辛、马伊达内克和索比堡一样被铭记。

text: Netanyahu: Israel is at the height of its power.
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡：以色列正处于其实力的巅峰。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇩🇺🇸 Indonesia says it is in talks with the United States over a potential agreement to grant U.S. military aircraft access to its airspace, though no deal has been finalized. U.S. Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth is expected to meet Indonesian Defense Minister…" ⚡️ 🇮🇩 🇺🇸 Indonesia’s Ministry of Defence has said that no final approval has been given for U.S. military aircraft to access its airspace. A blanket overflight clearance document has not been finalised and has no legal binding power, a ministry spokesman said. The proposal remains under internal and inter‑agency review. “The authority, control, and supervision of Indonesian airspace remains fully in the hands of Indonesia,” he added. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇩🇺🇸 印度尼西亚表示，正在与美国就一项潜在协议进行谈判，以允许美国军用飞机进入其领空，尽管尚未达成最终协议。预计美国国防部长皮特·赫格塞斯将与印尼国防部长会面……” ⚡️ 🇮🇩 🇺🇸 印度尼西亚国防部表示，尚未批准美国军用飞机进入其领空。该部发言人称，全面飞越许可文件尚未最终确定，也不具备法律约束力。该提案仍处于内部和跨部门审查阶段。他补充说：“印尼领空的权威、控制和监督权完全掌握在印尼手中。” @wfwitness

text: Netanyahu: We have alignment with the most powerful nation in the world, and together we have the capability to confront the gravest threats.
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡：我们与世界上最强大的国家保持一致，我们共同有能力应对最严重的威胁。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇫🇷🇬🇧🇹🇷🇮🇷 French President Emmanuel Macron said France and the UK will convene a conference with other countries willing to contribute to a peaceful multinational mission to restore freedom of navigation through the Strait of Hormuz. The initiative will…" ⚡️ 🇷🇺 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Kremlin spokesman Dmitry Peskov said the US blockade of the Strait of Hormuz will likely negatively impact global markets. “Many details remain unclear and incomprehensible, so I would refrain from making any substantive comments at this time,” he told reporters. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇫🇷🇬🇧🇹🇷🇮🇷 法国总统埃马纽埃尔·马克龙表示，法国和英国将与其他愿意为恢复霍尔木兹海峡航行自由的和平多国特派团做出贡献的国家召开会议。该倡议将……” ⚡️ 🇷🇺 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 克里姆林宫发言人德米特里·佩斯科夫表示，美国对霍尔木兹海峡的封锁可能会对全球市场产生负面影响。他告诉记者：“许多细节仍不清楚且难以理解，所以我现在不予置评。” @wfwitness

text: Netanyahu: Since Iran violated the rules, Trump decided to impose a blockade, a naval siege, and we of course support this firm position.
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡：由于伊朗违反了规则，特朗普决定实施封锁和海军围困，我们当然支持这一坚定立场。

text: Netanyahu: Yesterday, I spoke with Vice President JD Vance, who called me from his plane while returning from a trip. He briefed me in detail, as this administration does daily, on the developments in the negotiations. He conveyed to me that the central issue for President Trump and the United States is the removal of all enriched material and ensuring that there will be no enrichment in Iran for years to come, possibly decades.
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡：昨天，我与副总统万斯通了话，他在结束行程返回的飞机上给我打了电话。他像本届政府每天所做的那样，向我详细通报了谈判的进展。他向我传达，特朗普总统和美国的核心议题是清除所有浓缩材料，并确保伊朗在未来几年甚至几十年内不会进行任何浓缩活动。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said he spoke with U.S. Vice President JD Vance, who reported that talks collapsed because Iran violated the agreement to open the Strait of Hormuz after a ceasefire. The U.S. central demand is the removal of all enriched uranium from Iran and an end to future enrichment. Netanyahu expressed support for U.S. President Trump’s decision to impose a naval blockade on Iran, describing US‑Israel coordination as unprecedented. Visiting Israeli forces in Lebanon’s security zone, Netanyahu said fighting continues, now focused on Bint Jbeil. Without Israel’s strength, he warned, Iran’s nuclear sites would be remembered like Auschwitz. “They came to destroy us – now they fight for their survival.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡表示，他与美国副总统万斯通了话，万斯报告称，由于伊朗违反了停火后开放霍尔木兹海峡的协议，谈判破裂。美国的核心要求是清除伊朗所有浓缩铀并终止未来的浓缩活动。内塔尼亚胡对特朗普总统实施海军封锁伊朗的决定表示支持，称美以协调是前所未有的。在访问黎巴嫩安全区的以色列军队时，内塔尼亚胡表示战斗仍在继续，目前重点是宾特朱拜勒。他警告说，如果没有以色列的力量，伊朗的核设施就会像奥斯威辛集中营一样被铭记。“他们来摧毁我们——现在他们为生存而战。” @wfwitness

text: South Korean President Compares Israeli Killings to Nazi Holocaust, Sparking Debate South Korean President Lee Jae Myung sparked a diplomatic row with Israel on Friday, after comparing IDF wartime killings to the Nazi Holocaust on X, drawing Israeli condemnation & social media exchanges between politicians. READ MORE
text_zh: 韩国总统将以色列的杀戮比作纳粹大屠杀，引发争议。韩国总统李在明周五在X上将以色列国防军的战时杀戮与纳粹大屠杀进行比较，引发了与以色列的外交争端，招致以色列的谴责以及政客们在社交媒体上的交锋。阅读更多

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 An Israeli airstrike on Shaaitiyeh,Tyre. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列对提尔市沙伊蒂耶发动空袭。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇳 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 United Nations peacekeepers in Lebanon said an Israeli battle tank rammed their vehicles, warning shots struck clearly identifiable UN vehicles, and soldiers blocked movements and destroyed cameras. The IDF responded that a UNIFIL convoy arrived without coordination in an active combat zone, and that a minor collision occurred between one convoy vehicle and an IDF vehicle as troops allowed it to pass. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇳 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 联合国驻黎巴嫩维和部队表示，一辆以色列主战坦克撞击了他们的车辆，警告射击击中了清晰可辨的联合国车辆，士兵们阻碍了行动并摧毁了摄像机。以色列国防军回应称，联合国驻黎巴嫩临时部队（联黎部队）的车队在没有协调的情况下进入了活跃的战斗区，在部队让其通过时，车队的一辆车与以色列国防军的一辆车发生了轻微碰撞。 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Iran-linked hacking group Handala says it is targeting Saudi industrial infrastructure with cyberattacks. - Fars tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：与伊朗有关的黑客组织Handala称其正在利用网络攻击针对沙特的工业基础设施。 - Fars推文

text: WarTranslated Peskov stated that they respect the choice of the Hungarian people. "We expect that we will continue our very pragmatic contacts with the new leadership of Hungary. We have heard the statements, especially regarding the readiness to engage in dialogue." - Putin's spokesperson declared. tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated：佩斯科夫表示，他们尊重匈牙利人民的选择。“我们期待继续与匈牙利新领导层进行非常务实的接触。我们已经听到了相关声明，特别是关于进行对话的意愿。” - 普京发言人宣布。推文

text: Open Source Intel EU Commission President von der Leyen: "We are paying a very high price for our over-reliance on fossil fuels." EU's Von der Leyen: There can be no stability in the Middle East while Lebanon is in flames https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043641300298113255/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：欧盟委员会主席冯德莱恩：“我们为过度依赖化石燃料付出了非常高昂的代价。” 欧盟冯德莱恩：只要黎巴嫩处于战火之中，中东就不可能有稳定 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043641300298113255/photo/1 - 开源情报推文

text: Nuno Felix My man…. Golden rule of politics: never play politics with the Catholic Church. I'm not sure the Vatican realizes the extent to which they are playing with fire by bringing out into the open just how unhappy most American Catholics are with the establishment church. - Jason Atwell tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix：伙计……政治的黄金法则：永远不要拿天主教会玩政治。我不确定梵蒂冈是否意识到，通过公开大多数美国天主教徒对建制派教会的不满，他们是在玩火。 - Jason Atwell推文

text: Open Source Intel EU's Von der Leyen: There can be no stability in the Middle East while Lebanon is in flames https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043641300298113255/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：欧盟冯德莱恩：只要黎巴嫩处于战火之中，中东就不可能有稳定 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043641300298113255/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender Following the election in Hungary where Prime Minister Viktor Orbán lost to Péter Magyar, the Kremlin has voiced its desire to continue contacts with the new government following the transition period. Prime Minister Orbán government often sided against Ukraine when it came to votes on EU support for the nation, and was seen as one of the primary state-actor disrupters both within NATO and the EU, as it relates to measures related to Ukraine and Finnish/Swedish NATO ascension to NATO. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：在匈牙利总理维克托·欧尔班输给彼得·马贾尔的选举后，克里姆林宫表示希望在过渡期后继续与新政府保持联系。欧尔班政府在欧盟支持乌克兰的投票中经常站在乌克兰的对立面，被视为北约和欧盟内部的主要国家行为体破坏者之一，特别是在涉及乌克兰以及芬兰/瑞典加入北约的相关措施方面。推文

text: Open Source Intel NEW 🔴 The Kremlin says Russia is ready to take in Iran's enriched uranium as part of a future U.S.-Iran peace deal. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：最新🔴 克里姆林宫表示，作为未来美伊和平协议的一部分，俄罗斯准备接收伊朗的浓缩铀。推文

text: Open Source Intel President Trump is considering resuming strikes if the U.S. naval blockade fails to shift Iran’s position. - Axios tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：如果美国海军封锁未能改变伊朗的立场，特朗普总统正在考虑恢复打击。 - Axios推文

text: Nuno Felix May want to revise the NSS for all that to be true Europe — the one that explored and invented and dared — is not gone. It is waiting. Waiting for leaders who will tell it the truth. Waiting for friends honest enough to say: you are better than this, and we need you to be. The United States is that friend. Complicated, sometimes imperfect — but totally committed. To this alliance, to this relationship, and to an honest accounting of what it will take for Europe to reclaim its place at the center of history. -@UnderSecE - Brussels Media Hub tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix：可能需要修改国家安全战略（NSS）才能让这一切成为现实。欧洲——那个曾经探索、发明和敢于冒险的欧洲——并没有消失。它在等待。等待那些能告诉它真相的领导人。等待那些诚实到足以说出“你比这更好，我们需要你成为那样”的朋友。美国就是那个朋友。复杂，有时不完美——但完全致力于此。致力于这种联盟，这种关系，以及对欧洲重返历史中心所需条件的诚实评估。 - @UnderSecE - 布鲁塞尔媒体中心推文

text: Open Source Intel IDF Spokesperson in Arabic, Lt. Col. Avichay Adra'i: “Glory is not built on speeches, but on the pace of the soldiers' steps. Control over the Bint Jbeil stadium is not just a military achievement, but the shattering of a symbol of arrogance. Those who threatened us with flabbiness, their fortresses have collapsed in the face of our steadfastness. They thought we were weaker than a spider's web, and today we stood up to show the world the truth. The Israel Defense Forces are turning the page of illusions within their own home. The statement is ours, and the action is our doing." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：以色列国防军阿拉伯语发言人阿维查伊·阿德拉伊中校：“荣耀不是建立在演讲上，而是建立在士兵的步伐上。对宾特朱拜勒体育场的控制不仅是一项军事成就，更是对傲慢象征的粉碎。那些威胁我们软弱的人，他们的堡垒在我们的坚定面前已经崩溃。他们以为我们比蜘蛛网还脆弱，而今天我们站出来向世界展示了真相。以色列国防军正在翻开他们家园内幻想的一页。声明是我们的，行动也是我们的。” 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇭🇺 Hungary’s incoming prime minister Péter Magyar has expressed readiness to engage in talks with Putin if necessary. 🗣️ He explained that Hungary and Russia are “neighbors,” their geography won’t change, and reliance on Russian energy will persist for some time, though diversification must increase gradually. 📌 “If needed, we will negotiate, but we will not become friends,” Magyar said, adding that the new government will focus on real domestic issues rather than geopolitical games. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner：转发 @NSTRIKE1231：🇭🇺 匈牙利候任总理彼得·马贾尔表示，如有必要，愿意与普京进行会谈。🗣️ 他解释说，匈牙利和俄罗斯是“邻居”，地理位置不会改变，对俄罗斯能源的依赖在一段时间内仍将持续，尽管必须逐步增加多样化。📌 “如果需要，我们会谈判，但我们不会成为朋友，”马贾尔说，并补充说新政府将专注于国内的实际问题，而不是地缘政治游戏。与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Open Source Intel Palestinian sources say dozens of vessels left the port of Barcelona yesterday, en route to a meeting point before heading toward Gaza as part of a new flotilla. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043639219839496586/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：巴勒斯坦消息人士称，数十艘船只昨天离开巴塞罗那港，前往一个集合点，然后作为新船队的一部分前往加沙。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043639219839496586/video/1 推文

text: WarTranslated The new Prime Minister of Hungary, Péter Magyar, stated that dialogue with Russia is inevitable due to geography and energy dependence. "If necessary, we will conduct negotiations, but we will not become friends." - he added. tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated：匈牙利新总理彼得·马贾尔表示，由于地理和能源依赖，与俄罗斯的对话是不可避免的。“如果有必要，我们会进行谈判，但我们不会成为朋友。” - 他补充道。推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇹🇷🇮🇷 Turkey’s Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan said the Strait of Hormuz should reopen through “peaceful means” and warned that any military approach to securing the waterway would be “very complicated”. He added that “no country wants to be part of the war…" ⚡️ 🇫🇷 🇬🇧 🇹🇷 🇮🇷 French President Emmanuel Macron said France and the UK will convene a conference with other countries willing to contribute to a peaceful multinational mission to restore freedom of navigation through the Strait of Hormuz. The initiative will involve a strictly defensive mission, separate from the warring parties, to be deployed as soon as conditions allow. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇹🇷🇮🇷 土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹表示，霍尔木兹海峡应通过‘和平手段’重新开放，并警告说任何确保水道安全的军事手段都将‘非常复杂’。他补充说，‘没有国家想成为针对伊朗战争的一部分……’” ⚡️ 🇫🇷 🇬🇧 🇹🇷 🇮🇷 法国总统埃马纽埃尔·马克龙表示，法国和英国将与其他愿意为恢复霍尔木兹海峡航行自由的和平多国特派团做出贡献的国家召开会议。该倡议将涉及一项严格的防御性任务，与交战各方分开，并在条件允许时尽快部署。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇹🇷 🇮🇷 Turkey’s Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan said the Strait of Hormuz should reopen through “peaceful means” and warned that any military approach to securing the waterway would be “very complicated”. He added that “no country wants to be part of the war waged against Iran” and urged diplomatic solutions. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇹🇷 🇮🇷 土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹表示，霍尔木兹海峡应通过“和平手段”重新开放，并警告说任何确保水道安全的军事手段都将“非常复杂”。他补充说，“没有国家想成为针对伊朗战争的一部分”，并敦促采取外交解决方案。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in Nahariya, and the surrounding areas of the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部纳哈里亚及其周边对抗线地区响起无人机警报。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 Iranian Embassy in Thailand wins the shit posting game. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 伊朗驻泰国大使馆赢得了垃圾帖游戏。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Open Source Intel Hezbollah fired four rockets at the Karmiel area in northern Israel. Two were intercepted. Two hit open areas. No injuries reported. Several Hezbollah drones launched at the Galilee earlier were also intercepted. The IDF says it lost contact with some drones, indicating they crashed. No impacts in populated areas. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：真主党向以色列北部卡尔米尔地区发射了四枚火箭弹。两枚被拦截。两枚击中开阔地带。没有人员伤亡报告。早些时候向加利利发射的几架真主党无人机也被拦截。以色列国防军称与一些无人机失去了联系，表明它们已经坠毁。人口稠密地区没有受到影响。推文

text: WarTranslated In Budapest, locals tore down Orban’s anti-Ukrainian posters and celebrated Magyar’s election victory in various ways. People sang "We Are the Champions," while a Hungarian soldier shouted from the stage to the crowd that the government's attitude toward Ukraine had been absurd and had only weakened Hungary's position. tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated：在布达佩斯，当地人撕毁了欧尔班的反乌克兰海报，并以各种方式庆祝马贾尔的选举胜利。人们高唱“我们是冠军”，一名匈牙利士兵在台上向人群大喊，政府对乌克兰的态度是荒谬的，只会削弱匈牙利的地位。推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran has begun repairing railways damaged during the war. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043636797071073455/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：伊朗已开始修复战争期间受损的铁路。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043636797071073455/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel German government spokesperson: "We are assuming a U.S. blockade of Iranian ports, not of the Strait of Hormuz." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：德国政府发言人：“我们假设的是美国对伊朗港口的封锁，而不是对霍尔木兹海峡的封锁。” 推文

text: Open Source Intel German Chancellor Merz: "I was not surprised by the decision to break off the talks in Islamabad. From the beginning, I did not have the impression that they were really well prepared." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043635360542892301/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：德国总理默茨：“我对伊斯兰堡谈判破裂的决定并不感到惊讶。从一开始，我就没有觉得他们真的准备充分。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043635360542892301/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Kremlin: Russia's proposal to accept Iran's enriched uranium "remains on the table" but has not been taken up. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043634456875917678/photo/1 tweet

text: 🇾🇪 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Yemen’s Ansar Allah resistance movement warned that it will intensify its military operations if the US and Israeli regime resume aggression against Iran
text_zh: 🇾🇪 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 也门“安萨尔真主”抵抗运动警告称，如果美国和以色列政权恢复对伊朗的侵略，他们将加强军事行动。

text: Amnesty Demands Probe on Nigeria Market Bombing Misfire that Killed Over 100 People Nigerian Air Force jets struck a crowded weekly market in Yobe state on Saturday, killing over 100 civilians including children. Amnesty International & local community leaders demanded an independent probe as the military cited successful operations against insurgencies. READ MORE
text_zh: 大赦国际要求调查尼日利亚市场爆炸误炸事件，该事件造成100多人死亡。尼日利亚空军喷气式飞机周六袭击了约贝州一个拥挤的每周集市，造成包括儿童在内的100多名平民死亡。大赦国际和当地社区领袖要求进行独立调查，而军方则称这是针对叛乱的成功行动。阅读更多

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 The Kremlin says that Russia is ready to take in Iran’s enriched uranium as part of a future peace deal with the United States. @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Trump Faces Backlash: Iran Approval Plummets to 36% as Americans Worry About War Costs.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 特朗普面临强烈反对：伊朗支持率暴跌至36%，美国人担心战争成本。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇱🇧🇮🇱 Hezbollah announced between 01:20 and 09:45 on April 13 that they carried out rocket and drone attacks targeting the settlements of Kiryat Shmona, Doviv, and Shlomi, as well as the Matalba position. @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah announced between 10:55 and 11:45 on April 13 that they carried out multiple rocket and drone attacks targeting Israeli forces and positions, including Misgav Am, Kiryat Shmona, Avivim, and Shomera, as well as Al-Owaidat hill near Adaisseh. @wfwitness

text: 🔄 Forwarded from ResistanceTrench mirror: ⚡️ Pope Leo XIV on Trump : "I don't think that the message of the Gospel is meant to be abused in the way that some people are doing. I will continue to speak out loudly against war"
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 ResistanceTrench 镜像：⚡️ 教皇利奥十四世谈特朗普：“我不认为福音的信息应该像某些人那样被滥用。我将继续大声疾呼反对战争”

text: 🇷🇺 💬 🇭🇺 We respect the choice of the Hungarian people - Peskov "We expect to continue our very pragmatic contacts with the new leadership of Hungary. We have heard statements, especially about the readiness to engage in dialogue," - said the presidential press secretary. Peskov noted that it is necessary to observe the actions of the new leadership of Hungary. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 💬 🇭🇺 我们尊重匈牙利人民的选择 - 佩斯科夫 “我们期待继续与匈牙利新领导层进行非常务实的接触。我们已经听到了相关声明，特别是关于进行对话的意愿，” - 总统新闻秘书说。佩斯科夫指出，有必要观察匈牙利新领导层的行动。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
